overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk underpass tunnel from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily through a rain-slicked corridor with yellow tiled walls transitioning to red graffiti-covered sections, illuminated by fluorescent and neon lighting. The environment features digital billboards, ventilation ducts, and scattered debris, creating a dystopian urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic underpass with yellow tiled walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk of the rain-slicked underpass

entered.detail: distinctive yellow ceramic tile wall running along the right side of the corridor
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure on the left
long white fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
circular metal ventilation pipe running along the ceiling
rain-slicked dark asphalt road surface reflecting the overhead lights

segments.scene_description: Walking through a clean, rain-slicked underpass with distinctive yellow tiled walls on the right and massive concrete support pillars on the left. Overhead fluorescent lights and large ventilation ducts illuminate the empty corridor while the wet asphalt road reflects the cool artificial lighting.

events.description: passing a large illuminated digital billboard featuring a character in tactical gear on the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past digital advertisements mounted on the right wall

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying a figure in tactical gear against a purple background
newspapers and debris beginning to appear on the sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the underpass as a large digital billboard comes into view on the right wall, displaying futuristic advertisements. The yellow tiled walls and overhead lighting remain consistent while scattered trash begins to appear on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered red tile corridor with debris

events.description: walls transition from yellow tiles to red tiles covered in colorful graffiti
approaching illuminated yellow arrow signs and additional digital billboards on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the deteriorated section with accumulated trash and vibrant graffiti

entered.detail: wall covered in red ceramic tiles with extensive colorful graffiti and street art
spray-painted tags and murals covering the red tiled wall surface
accumulated garbage including tires, cardboard, and scattered papers on the sidewalk
multiple illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the left wall
yellow chevron arrow lights indicating direction mounted on the left wall
external HVAC unit mounted on the red tiled wall

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically to a grittier section with red tiled walls covered in vibrant graffiti and accumulated debris including tires and trash on the ground. Multiple digital billboards illuminate the left wall while yellow arrow lights become visible in the distance, guiding the path forward through the deteriorating underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic underpass that transforms from a sterile, industrial corridor into a gritty, graffiti-strewn urban wasteland. It begins by gliding past clean yellow tiled walls and massive concrete pillars, where overhead fluorescent lights reflect off a rain-slicked asphalt road. As the camera advances, the environment introduces a large digital billboard displaying futuristic advertisements while scattered trash begins to accumulate along the sidewalk. The scene then shifts dramatically into a deteriorating section characterized by red tiled walls covered in vibrant graffiti and piles of debris, including discarded tires. Finally, the path opens up toward a series of yellow arrow lights in the distance, illuminated by multiple digital billboards lining the left wall.
